episodes.summary: Devon Park staged the jalapeño corn dog site and watched verification pass smoothly. When someone suggested overthinking slowed things down, Devon agreed and pushed live confidently that Saturday.
episodes.key_moment: When someone suggested overthinking slowed things down, Devon agreed and pushed live confidently that Saturday.

episodes.summary: Devon Park spent the week preparing mini shepherd's pies for launch, staying responsive to his team's needs. He gracefully accepted feedback about priorities, showing he valued their input over his own preferences.
episodes.key_moment: He gracefully accepted feedback about priorities, showing he valued their input over his own preferences.

episodes.summary: Devon spent the week shepherding the pecan tassies toward launch, feeling confident when verification passed. They appreciated the team's smooth collaboration, though privately worried the bright background might overshadow the delicate pastry details.
episodes.key_moment: They appreciated the team's smooth collaboration, though privately worried the bright background might overshadow the delicate pastry details.
